name: Category Card
description: Catalog-backed category card with editorial overrides, focal-point-aware imagery, and safe navigation.

attribute_definition_groups.name: Category Card
attribute_definition_groups.description: Catalog-backed category card with editorial overrides, focal-point-aware imagery, and safe navigation.

attribute_definitions.name: Category
attribute_definitions.description: Select the catalog category used for default content and destination.

attribute_definitions.name: Image override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional Page Designer image. Its configured focal point is preserved.

attribute_definitions.name: Title override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional title. When empty, the selected category name is used.

attribute_definitions.name: Copy override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional supporting copy. When empty, the selected category description is used.

attribute_definitions.name: CTA URL override
attribute_definitions.description: Optional safe destination. When empty, the selected category URL is used.
